description: You are the county Emergency Management Director preparing for an incoming Category 4 hurricane. Your logistics team is converting a vacant residential building shell in Sweet Home 3D into a temporary disaster relief shelter. Transform this space into a fully functional shelter for at least 30 evacuees. The shelter must include specialized zones for Registration/Administration, Medical Triage, Sleeping Quarters, and Food Service, separated by partition walls where necessary. Furnish the Sleeping Quarters with at least 30 beds or cots in organized rows. The Medical Triage area must contain at least 3 medical beds and 3 storage cabinets. The Food Service area requires at least 4 large tables and 16 chairs, while the Registration/Admin area requires at least 3 desks and 6 chairs. Document safety clearance by drawing at least 3 dimension lines between rows or paths and identify the functional zones with at least 4 text labels. Use only the built-in catalog and save the completed project.
